task_completion.description: Create a 'County Summary' sheet listing the 15 specific counties alphabetically.

task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'County Summary' sheet, columns for average yield, best yield, worst yield, and yield range are present and populated with numerical data for each of the 15 counties.

task_completion.description: Determine performance category ('High', 'Medium', 'Low') and rank (1-15) for each county.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'County Summary' sheet, columns for performance category (containing text 'High', 'Medium', or 'Low') and rank (containing numbers 1 through 15) are present and populated.

task_completion.description: Include an 'Overall' summary row in the 'Statistics' sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Statistics' sheet contains a row labeled 'Overall' that summarizes the average, maximum, and minimum yields for the entire 2018-2022 period.
